description: Authoritative JLPT-graded Japanese dataset (kanji, vocab, grammar, history) via MCP and REST.
name: app.potto/potto-japan

headers.description: Bearer potto_ak_… API key from https://potto.app/developers/. Optional here because MCP clients can instead sign in via OAuth (the server issues a 401 + WWW-Authenticate challenge, RFC 9728). Free sample data is available on the REST API.
headers.name: Authorization
